finding: Paid OpenAI Coordinator and Review Agent calls reached the Responses API but returned HTTP 400 because `metadata.scopedPathCount` was encoded as an integer; OpenAI metadata values must be strings.
expectedBehavior: Provider request builders must conform to vendor metadata schemas, with deterministic body-shape assertions before paid dogfood.
evidenceOrRepro: Fixed 2026-07-14: `azure-openai.ts` and `microsoft-foundry.ts` now `String(scopedPaths.length)` like `openai.ts`; validator asserts added in `validate-team-agents.ts` (live team-plan preflight may still fail on foreign broker dirt).
followUp: Keep metadata values string-only across all OpenAI-family bridges.
